## TZ1.2. SECTION 2 – ACTUAL UNIT COST INCURRED BY THE USERS

### TZ1.2.1. FOCUS ON TERMINAL AUCU MONITORING AT CHARGING ZONE LEVEL

The actual terminal unit cost incurred by airspace users (AUCU) in respect of activities performed in 2025 (2 025.10 RON or 401.91 €) is +10.6% higher than the nominal DUC (1 830.68 RON or 363.33 €) The difference between these two figures (+194.42 RON/SU or +38.59 €/SU) is due to:

- the positive inflation adjustment resulting from higher than planned inflation (+37.22 RON/SU or +7.39 €/SU);

- the impact of adjustments resulting from the costs exempted from cost sharing mechanism (+0.90 RON/SU or +0.18 €/SU);

- the deduction of the traffic risk sharing adjustments (-65.17 RON/SU or -12.93 €/SU);

- the deduction of the traffic adjustment (-5.05 RON/SU or -1.00 €/SU) for the costs not subject to traffic risk sharing; and

- the deduction of other revenues (+226.52 RON/SU or +44.96 €/SU).
The share of the regulatory result (see next sub-section) in the AUCU (before the deduction of other revenues) is 0.2%.

Costs exempt from cost sharing for 2025 presented here are based on preliminary figures and remain subject to revision pending the receipt of the NSA Reports on the verification of cost sharing due by 1 September 2026. Any changes may affect the analysis of Actual Costs for Users and the Regulatory Results.

### TZ1.2.2. INITIATIVES IMPLEMENTED OR PLANNED THAT WILL IMPROVE THIS PI REPORTED BY THE NSA

The NSA of Romania provides the following information regarding the initiatives:

Insert text from monitoring report

### TZ1.2.3. NOTES 

#### TZ1.2.3.1. NOTE 1

#### TZ1.2.3.1. NOTE 2
